tools.name: put
tools.summary: Create or update an entry. Schema-validated. Returns {uid, etag}.
tools.args: key: string, _meta?: object, body?: string, content?: object, if_etag?: string

tools.name: propose
tools.summary: Write a proposal to the role's propose_lane. Auto-prefixes the key.
tools.args: key: string, _meta?: object, body?: string, content?: object

tools.name: key_delete
tools.summary: Delete one entry by key. Single-key, lower blast radius than key_delete_prefix; guarded by an optional optimistic-concurrency etag. Returns {ok, key, deleted}.

tools.name: key_mv
tools.summary: Rename one entry (same zone + format). Refuses if the target exists. Single-key, lower blast radius than key_mv_prefix.
tools.args: old_key: string, new_key: string, dry_run?: boolean

tools.name: accept
tools.summary: apply a queued proposal to its target zone; requires the author capability

tools.name: reject
tools.summary: discard a queued proposal without applying it

tools.name: enqueue
tools.summary: Push a registered job type onto the convergence queue, to be run by drain/serve.

tools.name: get
tools.summary: Read one entry - a pure on-disk read annotated with a freshness verdict; never ingests (quarantine freshness is drain + hook only, ADR 0089). Returns the envelope (uid, etag, _meta, body, freshness).

tools.name: ingest
tools.summary: Capture external source material into the raw lane. Write-once, agent-owned.
tools.args: kind: string, slug: string, url?: string, path?: string, zone?: string, label?: string

tools.name: list
tools.summary: List keys filtered by lane and/or prefix.

tools.name: where
tools.summary: Resolve a key to its zone, owner, and path without reading the body.

tools.name: deps
tools.summary: List the keys a derived entry depends on (its projection/external sources).

tools.name: rdeps
tools.summary: List the derived entries that depend on a key (reverse deps / impact set).

tools.name: pulse
tools.summary: Delta since cursor — changed entries, pending proposals, index freshness.

tools.name: rule_explain
tools.summary: Effective rules for a key. Lean {lifecycle, guard} by default; detail: true adds matched blocks + guard predicates.

tools.name: schema_show
tools.summary: Return the schema (field shape) for an entry's family, by key.

tools.name: boot
tools.summary: Return the orientation contract: lanes, agent_quickstart, agent_protocol, and pre-computed artifacts.

tools.name: jobs
tools.summary: List queued jobs by state; retry a dead-lettered job or purge a state.
tools.args: state?: string, action?: string, job_id?: string

maintenance.name: data_mv
maintenance.summary: Rename a data lane — manifest + files. Refuses if destination exists.
maintenance.args: from: string, to: string, dry_run?: boolean

maintenance.name: key_mv_prefix
maintenance.summary: Bulk-rename every leaf key under from_prefix to to_prefix. Dry-run returns a Plan; apply with dry_run: false.
maintenance.args: from_prefix: string, to_prefix: string, dry_run?: boolean

maintenance.name: key_delete_prefix
maintenance.summary: Bulk-delete every leaf key under prefix.

maintenance.name: drain
maintenance.summary: Seed materialize + sweep jobs then drain the queue to empty. Identical to one Watcher tick. Use when no watcher is running.

maintenance.name: rule_lint
maintenance.summary: Diff candidate manifest YAML's rules against the live manifest. No writes.
